titleStmt.title: SII 39.172: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 172. (A.R. No. 172 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARĀGHAVA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME MAṆḌAPA. VĪRAPRATĀPADĒVARĀYAMAHĀRĀYA, SADHĀRAṆA (1430-31 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription records the gift of 1310 paṇam by the king while he was at the temple of the Śri Virupākshadēva located on the banks of the Pampā river. His order was sent to Sirigirināyan at Chandragiri. The gift was meant for the supply of food offerings, conducting festivals and repair works to the temple of Porēṟṟuperumāḷ at Tiruppuṭkuḻi in Dāmaṟ kōṭṭam, in Chandragiri rājya. Śrī Virupāksha is engraved in Telugu at the end of the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī man Irājātirājaṉ Irāyaparamecuraṉ śrī virapradāpadeva
rāya mahārāyar candragiri śirigirinandhanukku nirupam candragiri
rājyattil tāmalkoṭṭattil tirupuṭkuḻiyil pereṟṟup pe
rumāḷukku cantirakiri paṇṭārattukku cellum coṭivarākaṉ poṉ
nūṟṟu muppattu toṉṟum paṇam Āṟekālum Ittile poreṟṟup
perumāḷukku nāḷḷoṉṟukku nālu taḷikai tiruppanākamum tiruna
ppaṇiyum nammuṭaiya tammam yeṉṟu tirupuṭkuḻiyil stānikar
kku viṇṇappañ ceykaiyil nām tiruvuḷḷam paṟṟi sādhāraṇa varuṣam vai
kāci mātam śuttabhaurṇamiyilum pampātirattil śrī virupākṣateva cannatiyil
Āśandrarkasthādhiyāka sarvamānyamāka Intac coṭip paṇam Ā
yirattu munnūṟṟu Oru pattu Āṟekāl paṇamum koṇṭu nammuṭaiya śrī
nāmattāle poreṟṟup perumāḷ nāḷ Oṉṟukku nālu taḷikai tirup
panākamum tirunāḷum tiruppaṇiyum naṭakkumpaṭi tārai Iṟaittu rāyasam
Unakku Uttāramum tiruvuḷḷam paṟṟiṉom Inta coṭip paṇam Ā
yirattu muṉṉūṟṟu Orupattu Āṟekāl paṇamum Itu koṇ
ṭu nālu taḷikai tiruppanākamum tirunaāḷum tiruppaṇiyum nammuṭaiya pe
rāle tinantoṟum naṭakkumpaṭi Uṉṉuṭaiya tiruvahiccīṭṭum ku
ṭuttu caṟuvamanyam Āka stāni mariyāti naṭattik koṇṭu varavum Inta
mānyattile naṭattik koṇṭuvaravum Inta rāyasa pratināluva
hiyilum Eḻutik koṇṭu Irāyasam stānikaṉ kaiyile mīḷa
śāsanamāka kuṭukkavum Inta tammam tappāmal naṭattik koṇṭu varavu
Digital edition of SII 39.172 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
